pages.visual_note: Final scanned page includes the deponent signature, commissioner stamp, handwritten place/date entries, commissioner details, and an additional handwritten signature mark. Handwriting is represented only where legible; uncertain handwritten text is not silently normalised.

page_sequence_observation.details: Both source copies place internal affidavit page 41 before internal page 40, followed by internal page 42.
